editorial.retrogradeActive: Retrograde motion softens the expression and turns it inward.

signPrompts.taurus: Stable, sensual presence and steady endurance.
signPrompts.virgo: Discernment, precision, and attention to detail.
signPrompts.libra: Harmony, relationship, and awareness of the other.
signPrompts.sagittarius: Search for meaning, expansion, and vision.

housePrompts.1: Here it becomes visible in identity and the way you present yourself.
housePrompts.2: Here it translates into value, resources, and security.
housePrompts.3: Here it appears in your voice, your ideas, and how you communicate.
housePrompts.4: Here it settles into roots, intimacy, and home.
housePrompts.5: Here it asks for creation, play, and the desire to express.
housePrompts.6: Here it is shaped through habits, daily work, and care.
housePrompts.7: Here it is revealed through relationship and the mirror of the other.
housePrompts.8: Here it intensifies through change and emotional depth.
housePrompts.9: Here it seeks horizon, vision, and expansion of meaning.
housePrompts.10: Here it takes public, vocational, and visible form.
housePrompts.11: Here it activates through networks, community, and future possibilities.
housePrompts.12: Here it works through the subtle, the inner, and the unconscious.
